debug_info.goal:
ax1 : ∀ (x : Inhab), Peculiar x ↔ (Sane x ↔ ¬Doctor x)
ax2 : ∀ (x : Inhab), Special x ↔ ∀ (y : Inhab), ¬Doctor y ↔ (Sane y ↔ Peculiar x)
ax3 : ∀ (x y : Inhab), (Sane x ↔ Special y) → (Sane (bf x) ↔ ¬Doctor y)
ax4 : Sane Tarr ↔ (x : Inhab) → Doctor x → Sane x
ax5 : Sane Fether ↔ ∀ (x : Inhab), ¬Doctor x → ¬Sane x
ax6 : Sane Fether ↔ Sane Tarr
⊢ False

failed_attempts:
by
  have h1 := ax1 Fether
  have h2 := ax1 Tarr
  have h3 := ax2 Fether
  have h4 := ax2 Tarr
  have h5 := ax3 Fether Tarr
  have h6 := ax3 Tarr Fether
  have h7 := ax4
  have h8 := ax5
  have h9 := ax6
  sorry

by
  have h₁ : False := by
    have h₂ := ax2 A
    have h₃ := ax2 B
    have h₄ := ax2 C
    have h₅ := ax2 D
    have h₆ := ax1 A
    have h₇ := ax1 B
    have h₈ := ax1 C
    have h₉ := ax1 D
    have h₁₀ := ax3 A A
    have h₁₁ := ax3 B B
    have h₁₂ := ax3 C C
    have h₁₃ := ax3 D D
    have h₁₄ := ax4
    have h₁₅ := ax5
    have h₁₆ := ax6
